description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-switch

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-switch/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 90 (A)
**Known issues:** formAssociated, _internals, _trackEl, _hasErrorSlot, _switchId, _labelId, _helpTextId, _errorId — all missing descriptions.

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Track, thumb, checked/unchecked colors. Disabled. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. switch role. aria-checked. Label association. Keyboard (Space). Error/help text.
3. **Functionality** — On/off toggle. Form integration. Validation. Error/help text. Required. Disabled.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. formAssociated. ElementInternals. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts (track, thumb). Transition animation. Focus-ring.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix all 8 missing descriptions.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Toggle. Form. Keyboard. ARIA. Validation.
8. **Storybook** — On/off. Disabled. Error. Help text. Form.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Boolean field. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Form-associated.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-switch
